hero.subtitle: Claude Code is Anthropic's intelligent coding tool that understands your codebase directly in the terminal, edits across files, runs tests, and manages Git workflows. One command, full takeover.

terminalLines.prompt2: > Refactor all files in the src/utils directory

features.title: Why Choose Claude Code
features.subtitle: Not just code completion — an intelligent coding partner that understands your entire project

items.title: Deep Code Awareness
items.desc: Reads through the entire codebase, understands project architecture, module relationships, and business logic. 200K ultra-long context window handles large projects effortlessly.

items.title: Cross-file Editing
items.desc: Modify multiple files at once, automatically maintaining code consistency. Intelligent editing that crosses file boundaries, from refactoring to new feature development.

items.title: Git Workflow
items.desc: Auto-create commits, resolve merge conflicts, generate PRs. Making version control a natural extension of the development process.

items.title: Terminal Native
items.desc: Run directly in the terminal, no need to switch IDE or chat windows. One claude command to start collaborating instantly.

items.title: IDE Integration
items.desc: Seamlessly integrates with VS Code and JetBrains IDEs. Terminal and editor side by side for efficient dual-window development.

items.title: Autonomous Execution
items.desc: Run tests, execute commands, create files — once authorized, Claude Code can autonomously complete entire development tasks.

install.title: Install in 3 Steps
install.subtitle: Requires only Node.js 18+ environment, one command to install. Supports macOS, Linux, and Windows (WSL).

installCodes.macosPrereq:
# Install Node.js (Homebrew recommended)
brew install node@20
installCodes.macosInstall:
# Install Claude Code globally
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
installCodes.macosVerify:
# Verify installation
claude --version

# Launch Claude Code
claude
installCodes.linuxPrereq:
# Install Node.js (Ubuntu/Debian)
curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash -
sudo apt-get install -y nodejs
installCodes.linuxInstall:
# Install Claude Code globally
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
installCodes.linuxVerify:
# Verify installation
claude --version

# Launch Claude Code
claude
installCodes.windowsPrereq:
# Install Node.js (WSL2 recommended)
# Visit https://nodejs.org to download
# Or in WSL2:
sudo apt update && sudo apt install nodejs npm
installCodes.windowsInstall:
# Install Claude Code globally
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
installCodes.windowsVerify:
# Verify installation
claude --version

# Launch Claude Code
claude

ide.title: Your IDE, Claude's Battlefield
ide.subtitle: Run Claude Code in terminal, sync changes in editor — seamless dual-window collaboration
ide.vscodeText: Run Claude Code in VS Code's integrated terminal, view file changes in real time, and track all modifications with the source control panel.
ide.vscodeCode:
# Start in VS Code terminal
cd your-project
code .
# Run in integrated terminal
claude
ide.jetbrainsText: Run Claude Code in JetBrains' built-in terminal, leverage powerful project navigation and refactoring, and collaborate with AI agents.
ide.jetbrainsCode:
# Start in JetBrains terminal
# Alt+F12 to open built-in terminal
cd your-project
# Run Claude Code
claude

cta.title: Ready to let AI take over your terminal?
cta.subtitle: One command to start a new paradigm of intelligent coding. Claude Code will become your most reliable coding partner.
